extraction.one_line_summary: JAKOBSEN Fabio won sprint after BISSEGGER Stefan's late solo attack, race split multiple times by JUMBO-VISMA/Quick-Step echelons dropping MCNULTY, ALMEIDA, SCHACHMANN 2:05 back
tactical_patterns: JUMBO-VISMA and Quick-Step deliberately fractured front group multiple times in crosswinds, eliminating GC threats before finale
LAMPAERT delivered monstrous turn through flam rouge neutralizing BISSEGGER late attack, revealing Quick-Step sprint setup priority over stage hunting
LAPORTE's yellow jersey positioning disrupted Quick-Step train but JAKOBSEN still dominated, showing Quick-Step adaptability under tactical interference
Second chase group with JORGENSON/GARCÍA CORTINA closed to 20 seconds but final crosswind acceleration killed reunion, timing echelons crucial

rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: negative: dropped in early echelons alongside ALMEIDA, lost 2:05 to GC favorites, major weakness in crosswind positioning
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: caught out in same early split as MCNULTY, losing 2:05 suggests vulnerability to aggressive echelon tactics
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: negative: defending champion lost 2:05 in early echelons, significant blow to GC ambitions on only stage two
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: survived all echelon splits and stayed attentive in final 20km accelerations, strong crosswind positioning for climber
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: made all key selections through multiple wind splits, showing improved classics-style racing awareness
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: initially distanced but regrouped to front, benefited from chase reunion before final split
rider_signals.HAGEN Carl Fredrik: neutral: distanced but regrouped with Simon Yates, profited from temporary chase group success
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: attentive through all final accelerations, Quick-Step/JUMBO tactics cleared path to third overall at 11 seconds
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: positive: marked with ROGLIČ through finale accelerations, strong positioning suggests podium contention
rider_signals.BISSEGGER Stefan: positive: timed late solo attack inside 8km forcing Quick-Step to commit LAMPAERT, tactical nuisance despite failure
rider_signals.LAMPAERT Yves: positive: monstrous turn through flam rouge neutralizing breakaway shows exceptional diesel power for sprint setup
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: positioned aggressively in yellow to disrupt Quick-Step train, tactical racing beyond jersey defense
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: finished second via LAPORTE leadout, JUMBO echelon dominance positioned him perfectly for sprint
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: won despite LAPORTE's train interference, demonstrated elite sprinting even without perfect setup
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: neutral: mentioned as present but no result impact, struggling to match top-tier sprint speed
rider_signals.JORGENSON Matteo: negative: led chase to 20 seconds but couldn't bridge final gap, crosswind accelerations too powerful
rider_signals.GARCÍA CORTINA Iván: negative: alongside JORGENSON in failed chase, positioning cost significant time despite strong effort
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: positive: stayed in front group through all selections including final accelerations, strong stage racing
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: made front group through multiple echelon splits, improved positioning for GC defense
rider_signals.HOLMES Matthew: neutral: kept polkadot jersey but dropped from finale group, prioritizing breakaway opportunities over GC
